title: Breadcrumb Navigation (Mission > Capability > Task)
changes: Server: new GET /api/tasks/:slug endpoint with parent hierarchy for breadcrumb
Server: /api/capabilities/:capId now includes mission_id and mission_title
Client: breadcrumb bar replaces Back button in capability and task detail views
Client: navigateTo() for clickable breadcrumb segments (Missions > Mission > Capability > Task)
Client: showTaskDetail() renders task DNA summary (slug, title, status, role, description, depends_on, pdsa_ref)
Client: task rows in capability detail are clickable to drill into task detail
